title: Deep Learning
description: Completed an industry-recognized Deep Learning certification covering neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, and model optimization. Gained hands-on experience with TensorFlow and PyTorch frameworks.
details: Acquired skills in building and deploying deep learning models for image recognition, natural language processing, and time series forecasting. Course Certificates Completed: Neural Networks and Deep Learning, Improving Deep Neural Networks: Hyperparameter tuning, Regularization and Optimization, Structuring Machine Learning Projects, Convolutional Neural Networks, Sequence Models.

title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
description: Completed the Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate, gaining hands-on experience with data cleaning, analysis, and visualization.
details: Developed critical thinking and data storytelling skills to support data-driven decision-making. Course Certificates Completed: Foundations: Data, Data, Everywhere, Ask Questions to Make Data-Driven Decisions, Prepare Data for Exploration, Process Data from Dirty to Clean, Analyze Data to Answer Questions, Share Data Through the Art of Visualization, Data Analysis with R Programming, Google Data Analytics Capstone: Complete a Case Study.

title: Accenture North America - Data Analytics and Visualization Job Simulation
description: Completed a virtual job simulation by Accenture North America focused on data analytics and visualization tasks.
details: Analyzed client datasets, identified business insights, and created compelling visuals to present findings. Gained practical experience in Excel, data storytelling, and consulting-style communication.

title: CERTIFICATE of PARTICIPATION
description: Earned a Certificate of Participation from TechTip24 for completing a hands-on Power BI project.
details: Built a dynamic Sales Analysis Dashboard using Power BI to visualize KPIs and sales trends. Gained experience in data modeling, DAX, and interactive dashboard creation.

title: Build Dashboards in Power BI
description: Successfully completed the 'Build Dashboards in Power BI' project offered by Coursera Project Network.
details: Learned to connect data sources, apply DAX formulas, and design user-friendly reports. Strengthened skills in data-driven storytelling using real-world scenarios.

title: Certificate of Participation on Unity
description: Participated in a Unity workshop organized by ARK, gaining exposure to game development fundamentals.
details: Explored Unity’s interface, scene building, and scripting with C#. Learned core concepts like physics, animation, and asset integration.

title: Mastering Data Analysis with Pandas
description: Completed the 'Mastering Data Analysis with Pandas' project offered by Coursera Project Network.
details: Worked with real-world datasets to uncover insights through filtering, grouping, and aggregation using the Pandas library.

title: Introduction to Python Programming
description: Gained foundational knowledge of Python syntax, control structures, functions, and data types.
details: Developed problem-solving skills through coding exercises and practical examples.

title: Fundamentals of Visualization with Tableau
description: Completed the 'Fundamentals of Visualization with Tableau' course offered by UC Davis.
details: Learned to create dashboards, stories, and impactful visualizations using Tableau.
